# Experiment Log — Tip-recording 2025-01-15

tags: #example

date: 2025-01-15
operator: sample-user
protocol: protocols/tip_recording_v3.md
specimens: GR66-KO larvae L5 (n=10)

---

## Deviations from Protocol

- Buffer concentration changed from 0.1 mM → 0.05 mM KCl (insufficient reagent stock)
- Anesthesia duration: as specified, 2 minutes

## Results Summary

- Trials: 10
- Valid recordings: 6 (4 invalid: 3 electrode shifts, 1 drift)
- Mean firing rate to xanthotoxin 1 mM: 5 ± 2 spikes/s (n=6)
- WT (previous session 2024-12-20): 50 ± 10 spikes/s → marked response attenuation in KO

## Observations and Next Actions

- No increase in noise at 0.05 mM KCl → low concentration acceptable next time
- 60% valid recording rate is low. Review electrode fabrication procedure (tip diameter may be too large)
- To increase WT comparisons, record WT on the same day next session
